title: quassia maiana
intro: Quassia maiana, also known as Yellow Root, is a tropical plant native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its bitter compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Quassia maiana include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. The herbal preparation of Quassia maiana typically involves making a tea from the plant's root, bark, or leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
